reviews.review_title: Game is lowk buns fr fr
reviews.review_description: Yo bruh, how is you gonna copy a game and then say “Good game cuz it’s mine lol” like bruh this game is trash. Speaking of that, the lighting is horrible lowk. If you gonna copy a game, give it credits and make it different a bit or sum 💀

Hey pal when you ever think of trying to post our game in Meta, think twice as were registered under a Company and Copyright and proceed legal action, How do you actually make a leaked project much worst lmao, horrible developer with horrible skid knowledge, do better
It isnt original you copied primate fear and the lighting is soo trash same to computer that dissapears
Good game cuz it’s mine lol
